name: Google Calendar
description: Manage events and find free time via an installed MCP server. Used by calendar and chief domains to weave meetings into daily briefings.
connection: Wrapped via an MCP server installed locally. The server handles its own OAuth dance; prevail just needs to know the server binary is on PATH. Install via `npm i -g @anthropic-ai/mcp-server-gcal` (or whichever provider you use), then probe.
